# opnsense_unbound_host_alias (Resource)

Manages an Unbound DNS host alias on OPNsense. A host alias adds an additional hostname that resolves to an existing host override.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) Domain for the alias (e.g., `example.com`).
- `host` (String) UUID of the host override this alias points to.
- `hostname` (String) Hostname for the alias (the part before the domain).

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the host alias.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this host alias is enabled. Defaults to `true`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID of the host alias in OPNsense.
